heading: View stream processing workspaces
body:
To view your stream processing workspaces:**View-spi-cli:**Atlas CLITo list all stream processing workspaces in the project you specify using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas api streams listStreamWorkspaces [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas api streams listStreamWorkspaces](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-api-streams-listStreamWorkspaces).**View-spi-ui:**Atlas UI**View-spi-api:**Atlas Administration APIThe Atlas Administration API provides different endpoints for
retrieving one or all stream processing workspaces.[Return One Stream Workspace](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupstreamworkspace)[List All Stream Workspaces](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupstreamworkspaces)
